display_text: Ringmaster Aghanim's Scepter: Escape Act gains 2 charges and throws Impalement Art daggers in all directions upon activation. This upgrade counters high-mobility and grouped enemies by providing burst damage and area denial, transforming Ringmaster into a potent teamfight disruptor who can punish clustered enemies.
search_text: Ringmaster Aghanim Scepter anti-mobility area denial burst damage teamfight disruptor

display_text: Ringmaster Aghanim's Shard: Spotlight sweeps an area, causing enemies to miss attacks and revealing invisibility. This upgrade counters evasion, invisibility, and illusion-based heroes by disrupting their effectiveness and providing vision control, enhancing Ringmaster's utility as a vision and anti-carry specialist.
search_text: Ringmaster Aghanim Shard anti-evasion anti-invisibility illusion counter vision control
